(b) In sub-para (2) of para 1 of the said notification, the word and figure “Column 2” may be read as “Column 4”. K.S. MONEY, Member (Admn.) [ADVT Ill/4/122/2009-Exty.] Foot Note: The principal regulations were published vide Notification No. NHAR-1201 l/l/95-Admn, dated 1 lth March, 1996, in the Gazette ofIndia, Extraordinary, Part 111, Section 4, dated the 1 1th March, 1996 and last amended vide Notification No. NHAI/l 1012/ 147/2009-HR.I, dated 25th November, 2009, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part 111, Section 4, dated the 25th November, 2009.
